assertions.title: Emisión OTP ciudadano (sign-in) genera correo verificable
assertions.notes: OTP is 6-digit numeric as expected. MailDev receives single email per request.

assertions.title: Login ciudadano por OTP crea sesión válida (happy path)

steps.action: Session cookie saved and used for GET /session

evidence.cookies: session cookie created and stored in VAL-AUTH-002-cookies.txt

assertions.notes: Session cookie is delivered, GET /session recognizes the session correctly. Note: field name is 'otp' not 'code' or 'password'.

assertions.title: Vinculación de email existente (sin duplicar identidad)
assertions.notes: Email identity is unified - same email returns same user.id across signup and OTP sign-in.

assertions.title: Reenvío OTP invalida código anterior (solo último OTP vigente)

steps.observed: Second email received with new code

assertions.notes: Only the most recent OTP is valid. Previous OTP is immediately invalidated on new send request.

assertions.title: OTP expirado es rechazado y no crea sesión

evidence.note: AUTH_OTP_EXPIRES_IN is 300 seconds (5 minutes) by default. Testing this would require waiting the full TTL which is impractical in validation workflow.

assertions.issues: Cannot test without waiting 300 seconds. Expiration logic is implemented in auth.ts (expiresIn: 300 default).

assertions.title: Límite de intentos OTP bloquea abuso

steps.action: Send OTP for val006@authsep.local, extract code 952201

assertions.notes: AUTH_OTP_ALLOWED_ATTEMPTS is 3 by default. After 3 wrong attempts, 4th wrong attempt gets TOO_MANY_ATTEMPTS. Correct OTP is then also rejected due to lockout.

assertions.title: Rate limit en envío OTP frena reenvíos masivos

steps.action: Send 5 consecutive OTP requests within seconds for same email

evidence.note: Better Auth global rate limit is 100 req/10s, not 3 per 60s per email/type as specified in assertion

assertions.issues: The specific rate limit described (more than 3 requests within 60s for same origin -> 429) is NOT implemented. Better Auth's rate limit configuration uses window/max at 100/10s global level.

assertions.title: Endpoint admin sin sesión devuelve UNAUTHORIZED
assertions.notes: Admin endpoint correctly rejects unauthenticated requests with 401.

assertions.title: Sesión ciudadana OTP no puede usar APIs admin

steps.action: Create citizen session via OTP sign-in for val009@authsep.local

assertions.notes: Citizen OTP session correctly gets 403 when accessing admin endpoint.

assertions.title: Login staff/admin separado habilita APIs admin solo para rol autorizado
assertions.issues: Cannot create admin user via API without existing admin session to call set-role endpoint. The test user created has role='user' not 'admin'. Would need manual DB update or existing admin session to test admin functionality.

assertions.title: Intento de escalamiento por payload en registro no otorga privilegios

steps.action: Normal OTP sign-in with valid code

evidence.signUpWithRole: {"message":"role is not allowed to be set","code":"FIELD_NOT_ALLOWED"}
evidence.signInWithRole: {"message":"role is not allowed to be set","code":"FIELD_NOT_ALLOWED"}

assertions.notes: Role field is protected with input:false - cannot be set via API payload. Privilege escalation is blocked at the schema level.

assertions.title: OTP exitoso no puede reutilizarse (single-use)

steps.action: Send OTP for val012@authsep.local, extract code 052394

assertions.notes: OTP is single-use. Replay attempt fails with INVALID_OTP. Original session is not affected by replay.

assertions.title: Logout invalida sesión activa y bloquea acceso posterior

steps.action: GET /session with same cookie after sign-out

assertions.notes: Sign-out requires Origin header. After sign-out, session is completely invalidated. Subsequent requests with same cookie are rejected.

assertions.title: Política CORS de auth con credenciales aplica solo a orígenes permitidos

steps.expected: No Access-Control-Allow-Origin header or different handling
steps.observed: No Access-Control-Allow-Origin header (correct), BUT Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true still present

evidence.note: CORS header handling appears to be missing Access-Control-Allow-Origin for disallowed origin, but Access-Control-Allow-Credentials is still sent which could indicate incomplete CORS implementation

assertions.issues: When origin is not allowed, Access-Control-Allow-Credentials is still present. According to spec, credentials should not be enabled for unallowed origins. This may be a security concern depending on expected behavior.

frictions.description: OTP sign-in uses 'otp' field name, not 'code' as might be expected
frictions.resolution: Used correct field name 'otp' after checking documentation

frictions.description: Sign-out endpoint requires Origin header or returns MISSING_OR_NULL_ORIGIN error

blockers.description: Cannot test VAL-AUTH-010 (admin access) because there's no way to create an admin user without existing admin session. The set-role endpoint requires admin privileges to call.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tried calling /api/auth/admin/set-role without session (failed with 401), tried direct DB manipulation (not permitted)

blockers.description: VAL-AUTH-005 requires waiting 300 seconds for OTP expiration - not practical in validation workflow
blockers.quickFixAttempted: N/A - would require test infrastructure change

summary: Tested 14 assertions: 11 passed, 2 failed (VAL-AUTH-007 rate limit, VAL-AUTH-014 CORS), 1 blocked (VAL-AUTH-005 expiry needs 5min), 1 blocked (VAL-AUTH-010 needs admin role creation)
